sentences.arabic: كَانَ يَوْمُ الِاثْنَيْنِ مَشْغُولًا جِدًّا لِعَلَاءٍ.
sentences.translation: Ponedjeljak je bio veoma zauzet za Alaau.
sentences.translationEn: Monday was very busy for Alaa.

sentences.arabic: اجْتَمَعَ بِثَلَاثَةِ أَشْخَاصٍ وَأَتَمَّ أَرْبَعَ مَهَامٍّ.
sentences.translation: Imao je sastanak s tri osobe i završio četiri zadatka.
sentences.translationEn: He met with three people and completed four tasks.

sentences.arabic: أَكَلَ غَدَاءَهُ عَلَى عَجَلٍ أَمَامَ الْحَاسُوبِ.
sentences.translation: U žurbi je ručao ispred računara.
sentences.translationEn: He ate his lunch hurriedly in front of the computer.

sentences.arabic: فِي الْمَسَاءِ تَنَهَّدَ وَقَالَ «الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ انْتَهَى الْيَوْمُ».
sentences.translation: Uveče je uzdahnuo i rekao «hvala Bogu, dan je završen».
sentences.translationEn: In the evening he sighed and said «thank God, the day is over».
